The '''''Atrisian Iron''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] that served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
It was destroyed by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces during the [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]].

{{Ship-stub}}
